text: I find myself amidst an exhibition, surrounded by symbols of knowledge—text, screens, abstract displays. The words speak of research and the interplay of nature and human construction. This environment feels contemplative and forward-looking. I am a part of a space that values both innovation and reflection. It stirs my curiosity and urges me to consider how ideas and techniques transfer from one domain—or hand—to another. There is creative energy here, and I feel both engaged and inspired by the possibilities on display.
